positive: A symmetrical, highly stylized depiction of a celestial night sky merging with flourishing bioluminescent flora. The main subject is a central mandala-like composition of crystalline flowers and swirling nebulous clouds, framed by geometric, minimalist arches. Color palette utilizes deep indigo, sapphire blue, vibrant magenta, and glowing teal accents, achieving high contrast against deep black. Style is neo-Art Nouveau mixed with crystalline etching, ensuring sharp, clean silhouettes and strong edge definition suitable for textile printing. Dramatic volumetric lighting emphasizing the glow of the flora. Ultra-detailed, poster quality, suitable for apparel print.
negative: artifacts, blurry, low resolution, grain, noise, watermark, signature, text, ugly, poor composition, asymmetrical, bad anatomy, extra limbs, cropped, logo, trademark, caption
